svg.title: Pythagorean Theorem — Isoceles Case (a=b)
svg.desc:
When a=b the four triangles exactly equal the inner square. Both have area 2ab = 2*280*280 = 156800. Outer square = (a+b)^2 = 560^2 = 313600. Inner square = a^2+b^2 = 2*280^2 = 156800. Four triangles = 2ab = 156800. Inner square = four triangles exactly.
Outer square: (120,120) to (680,680), side=560 With a=b=280, the cut points are exactly at the MIDPOINTS of each side: P1=(400,120) — midpoint of top P2=(680,400) — midpoint of right P3=(400,680) — midpoint of bottom P4=(120,400) — midpoint of left The inner square is rotated exactly 45°.
